messages.content: PROEL

PROEL is an Italian company that specializes in the design, production, and distribution of audio and lighting equipment. They offer a wide range of products including microphones, speakers, amplifiers, mixers, and lighting fixtures. PROEL has been in operation since 1991 and has established itself as a leader in the industry with their high-quality and innovative products. They serve a variety of customers including professional musicians, sound engineers, DJs, and audiovisual companies. PROEL is known for their commitment to providing reliable and durable equipment that meets the needs of their customers.
LDR

LDR stands for Light Dependent Resistor. It is a type of resistor whose resistance value changes with the amount of light falling on its surface. LDRs are made from semiconductor materials that exhibit a property called the photoconductive effect, where the conductivity of the material increases with the intensity of light. 

LDRs are commonly used in various electronic devices and circuits for light sensing and control purposes. They can be found in light meters, automatic street lights, solar panels, camera light sensors, and many other applications. When used in a circuit, the resistance of an LDR decreases as the light intensity increases, and vice versa.

LDRs are often used in combination with other electronic components to create light-sensitive circuits. For example, they can be used in conjunction with relays or transistors to control the activation or deactivation of a device based on the level of light detected. LDRs are affordable, easy to use, and widely available, making them a popular choice for light sensing applications.
SBS Lighting

SBS Lighting is a lighting company that specializes in providing lighting solutions for various industries and applications. They offer a wide range of products and services related to lighting, including LED lighting fixtures, control systems, and installation services.

SBS Lighting focuses on energy-efficient and sustainable lighting solutions, using advanced technologies to reduce energy consumption and environmental impact. They work with clients from different sectors such as commercial buildings, industrial facilities, sports arenas, entertainment venues, and more.

Their product offerings include LED high bay lights, floodlights, office lighting systems, street lights, and outdoor architectural lighting solutions. SBS Lighting also provides lighting design services, ensuring that the lighting installations are optimized for the specific needs and goals of their clients.

With a focus on quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, SBS Lighting aims to deliver efficient and reliable lighting solutions that enhance the aesthetics, functionality, and sustainability of spaces.

Concept Group

Concept Group is a Nigerian conglomerate that operates across various industries, including real estate development, facility management, logistics, and technology solutions. Established in 1997, Concept Group has grown to become a leading player in the Nigerian market, providing innovative solutions and services to its clients.

The real estate division of Concept Group is involved in the development, construction, and management of residential, commercial, and industrial properties. They aim to deliver high-quality buildings and spaces that meet the needs of their clients.

Under the technology solutions division, Concept Group offers a wide range of IT services, including software development, data management, and IT infrastructure solutions. They also provide consulting services to help businesses optimize their technology systems and processes.

Concept Group also operates a logistics arm that offers end-to-end supply chain management solutions, including procurement, warehousing, distribution, and transportation services. They have a strong network and expertise in managing logistics operations for various industries.

Additionally, Concept Group provides facility management services to ensure the smooth operation and maintenance of buildings and facilities. They offer services such as cleaning, maintenance, security, and HVAC system management.

Overall, Concept Group strives to deliver quality solutions, innovation, and value to its clients across different sectors in Nigeria.

https://www.chromlech.fr/pages/en/home.php

Chromlech is a professional lighting manufacturer based in France. They specialize in creating innovative and high-quality lighting fixtures and solutions for the entertainment and architectural lighting industries. 

Chromlech offers a range of products that include LED fixtures, control systems, and various lighting accessories. Their fixtures are designed to provide dynamic and customizable lighting effects, allowing users to create stunning visual displays for concerts, theaters, events, installations, and other applications.

One of Chromlech's notable product lines is the Elidy series, which consists of LED pixel-mapping fixtures. These fixtures feature individually addressable LEDs that can be controlled to create intricate patterns, shapes, and animations. The Elidy fixtures are commonly used for creating immersive and interactive lighting displays.

Chromlech also offers control solutions for their lighting fixtures, including DMX controllers and software. These control systems allow users to program and manage the lighting effects and settings of their fixtures.

With a focus on innovation and quality, Chromlech aims to push the boundaries of lighting design and technology. They collaborate with lighting professionals, designers, and artists to develop cutting-edge solutions that meet the ever-evolving needs of the industry.

Dushow

Dushow is a French company that specializes in providing audiovisual and event technology solutions. With over 40 years of experience, Dushow is a leading provider of equipment rental, technical production, and event support services for a wide range of events, including concerts, corporate meetings, trade shows, and festivals.

Dushow offers a comprehensive range of audio, lighting, video, rigging, and staging equipment to support various event requirements. Their inventory includes state-of-the-art sound systems, lighting fixtures, LED screens, projectors, trusses, and rigging gear.

In addition to equipment rental, Dushow offers technical production services to ensure smooth and successful events. Their teams of experienced technicians and engineers work closely with clients to design, set up, and manage the technical aspects of events, including sound reinforcement, lighting design, video projection, and stage installation.

Dushow also provides event support services such as logistics coordination, on-site technical operation, and event management. They have a dedicated team that assists clients in planning and executing events with professionalism and expertise.

Overall, Dushow is known for its high-quality equipment, technical expertise, and customer-centric approach. They strive to deliver innovative and reliable audiovisual solutions to help clients create memorable and impactful events.
MSL Circuits

MSL Circuits is a Chinese company that specializes in the design, manufacturing, and assembly of printed circuit boards (PCBs). With over 10 years of experience in the industry, MSL Circuits offers a range of PCB solutions to meet the diverse needs of clients.

MSL Circuits provides services for both prototype and production PCBs, catering to various industries such as telecommunications, automotive, industrial electronics, consumer electronics, and more. They offer single-sided, double-sided, and multi-layer PCBs, with the ability to handle different PCB technologies like rigid, flexible, and rigid-flex boards.

The company is committed to delivering high-quality PCBs and meeting strict industry standards. MSL Circuits utilizes advanced equipment and technologies to ensure precise manufacturing and assembly processes. They also have quality control measures in place to ensure that all assembled PCBs meet the required specifications and functionality.

In addition to PCB manufacturing and assembly, MSL Circuits offers related services such as PCB design, layout, and testing. They have a skilled team of engineers who can assist clients in optimizing their PCB designs and addressing any technical challenges.

Overall, MSL Circuits aims to provide reliable, cost-effective, and efficient PCB solutions to its clients, supporting their electronic product development and manufacturing needs.
Ultratec Special Effects

Ultratec Special Effects is a company that specializes in the design and manufacturing of professional special effects equipment and systems. With over 35 years of experience, Ultratec is known for providing high-quality and innovative solutions for the entertainment industry.

Ultratec offers a wide range of special effects products, including fog machines, haze machines, snow machines, flame projectors, confetti cannons, and more. These effects are used in various applications such as theaters, concerts, theme parks, film and television productions, and special events.

One of Ultratec's notable product lines is their fog and haze machines. These machines are designed to produce controlled and atmospheric fog or haze effects, enhancing the visual and dramatic impact of performances and events. The company's fog fluids and hazers are known for their consistency, density, and longevity.

Ultratec also provides comprehensive support to its clients, including technical assistance, training, and consultation services. They work closely with customers to understand their specific needs and provide customized solutions to achieve the desired effects.

Safety is a key priority for Ultratec, and their special effects equipment is designed and manufactured to meet the highest safety standards. They prioritize the development of eco-friendly and non-toxic products that adhere to environmental regulations.

Overall, Ultratec Special Effects is a trusted name in the entertainment industry, offering reliable and innovative special effects solutions that enhance the visual impact and immersive experience of various productions and events.

Apologies for the confusion. It appears that Star Lighting Division is related to Star Indústria e Comércio de Produtos Eletrônicos Ltda, a Brazilian company. Star Indústria e Comércio de Produtos Eletrônicos specializes in the production and distribution of LED lighting products.

Their website, https://site.star.ind.br/, offers information about their various LED lighting solutions. They provide a range of products, including LED bulbs, spotlights, downlights, floodlights, and streetlights. Their products cater to different applications, such as residential, commercial, and outdoor lighting.

Star Indústria e Comércio de Produtos Eletrônicos focuses on energy-efficient and environmentally-friendly LED lighting solutions. They aim to provide quality products that meet the needs of their customers while also reducing energy consumption and carbon footprint.

On their website, you can find product catalogs, technical specifications, and contact information for further inquiries or sales.
